title: Adobe PDF Services Job
description: Represents an asynchronous PDF processing job in the Adobe PDF Services API. A job is created when an operation is submitted (such as creating, converting, extracting, or manipulating a PDF). The job is processed asynchronously and its status can be polled until completion. Upon completion, the job provides an output asset with a download URI.

status.description: The current processing status of the job. A job starts as 'in progress' when submitted and transitions to 'done' upon successful completion or 'failed' if an error occurs.

asset.description: The output asset produced by the job. Available when status is 'done'.

error.description: Error details when the job has failed. Available when status is 'failed'.

OutputAsset.description: An output asset produced by a completed PDF Services job. Contains the asset identifier, a time-limited download URI, and metadata about the output file.

assetID.description: The unique identifier for the output asset, in Adobe Asset ID (AAID) URN format.

downloadUri.description: A pre-signed URI for downloading the output file. This URI is valid for a limited time (typically 24 hours) and should be used promptly.

AssetMetadata.description: Metadata describing an output asset's file properties.

type.description: The MIME type of the output file.

size.description: The size of the output file in bytes.

InputAsset.description: A reference to an uploaded input asset used in a PDF Services operation. Assets must be uploaded to the platform before they can be referenced in an operation request.

assetID.description: The unique identifier of the uploaded input asset.

AssetUpload.description: Represents an asset upload session. When requesting an upload, the API returns a pre-signed upload URI and an asset ID. The client must PUT the file content to the upload URI.

assetID.description: The unique identifier assigned to the asset upon upload registration.

uploadUri.description: The pre-signed URI to which the file content should be uploaded via HTTP PUT.

PageRange.description: Defines a contiguous range of pages within a PDF document. Page numbers are 1-based and inclusive.

start.description: The first page in the range (1-based).

end.description: The last page in the range (1-based, inclusive).

PasswordProtection.description: Password protection settings for securing a PDF document. A user password restricts opening the document. An owner password restricts editing permissions.

userPassword.description: The password required to open the PDF document.

ownerPassword.description: The password required to change permissions or remove protection from the PDF.

Permissions.description: Document permissions that can be set when protecting a PDF. Controls what actions users can perform on the document.

editContent.description: Whether editing the document content is permitted.

copyContent.description: Whether copying text and images from the document is permitted.

editAnnotations.description: Whether adding or modifying annotations is permitted.

fillForms.description: Whether filling in form fields is permitted.

assembleDocument.description: Whether assembling the document (inserting, rotating, deleting pages) is permitted.

ExtractOptions.description: Configuration options for the PDF Extract operation. Controls which elements are extracted and in what format.

elementsToExtract.description: The types of elements to extract from the PDF.

elementsToExtractRenditions.description: Rendition types to generate for extracted elements. Generates images of tables and/or figures.

tableOutputFormat.description: The output format for extracted tables.

getStylingInfo.description: Whether to include styling information such as font name, size, color, bold, and italic in the structured output.

addCharInfo.description: Whether to include character-level bounding box coordinates in the structured output.

PDFProperties.description: Properties and metadata retrieved from a PDF document.

pageCount.description: The total number of pages in the PDF.

isEncrypted.description: Whether the PDF is password-protected or encrypted.

isLinearized.description: Whether the PDF is optimized for fast web viewing.

hasFormFields.description: Whether the PDF contains interactive form fields.

isTagged.description: Whether the PDF contains accessibility tags.

title.description: The document title from PDF metadata.

author.description: The document author from PDF metadata.

creator.description: The application that created the original document.

producer.description: The application that produced the PDF.

modifiedDate.description: When the PDF was last modified.

pages.description: Page-level properties, included when includePageLevelProperties is true.

PageProperties.description: Properties for a single page within a PDF document.

width.description: The page width in points (1 point = 1/72 inch).

height.description: The page height in points (1 point = 1/72 inch).

JobError.description: Error information returned when a PDF Services job fails.

code.description: A machine-readable error code identifying the type of failure.

message.description: A human-readable description of the error.

status.description: The HTTP status code associated with the error.
